citation.description: show_ticket results: 4e19 status=closed, 7c84 status=closed, e7e0 status=closed, fde0 status=closed, 46f0 status=closed, a3db status=closed — all 6 children carry completion-verifier PASS signatures.

build_payload emits schema=plan_review_result_v2, persists evidence/scenarios/block_threshold/blocking_enabled per finding across all 5 buckets, full 5-field coaching. src/rebar/llm/code_review/sidecar.py:74-112 (schema=code_review_result_v2) pools blocking/advisory/dropped/indeterminate with norm_id. src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/decide.py:281-365 (pass3_decide returns block_threshold/blocking_enabled on every path). Oracle tests: tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_workflow.py:367-442 (real emit path), tests/unit/test_audit_plan_review_v2.py, tests/unit/test_audit_code_review_v2.py, tests/unit/test_audit_coaching_fidelity.py.

criteria.criterion: After this epic, a freshly-run plan-review and code-review each write a *_v2 sidecar whose payload contains every pass-1 finding across all buckets with its pass-2 verification, its pass-3 validity/impact/priority/decision/reason, the resolved numeric block_threshold, and the pass-4 coaching. Oracle: an integration test runs a review and asserts on the emitted event JSON.

citation.description: build_payload branches on PASS verdict → schema=completion_verifier_pass_v1 + criteria[]. src/rebar/llm/contracts.py:102-133 declares Criterion + criteria field on CompletionVerdict. src/rebar/_commands/transition_close.py:244-256 emits on PASS path. Oracle tests: tests/unit/test_audit_completion_v2.py, tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py:597-620 (test_pass_close_persists_criteria_record), tests/external/test_completion_pass_live.py.

criteria.criterion: A completion-verification PASS emits a per-criterion audit record. Oracle: a test asserting on the emitted completion event.

citation.description: audit_trail() returns AuditTrail TypedDict with ticket/plan_reviews/completion/code_reviews; resolves code_review relates_to links. CLI: src/rebar/_cli/_audit_commands.py + src/rebar/_cli/help/audit.txt (rebar audit show). MCP: src/rebar/_mcp_reads.py:121-132 (audit_trail tool, READ_ONLY annotation). Oracle tests: tests/unit/test_audit_read.py (aggregate, bare, enumerator, CLI subprocess, MCP tool under REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1).

criteria.criterion: The audit read layer returns the full retained history for a ticket and its relates_to-linked code reviews. Oracle: an integration test seeding a ticket's histories and asserting the aggregate contains all of them.
